query: SELECT id, name, nickname, city, abbrev, dbSlug, vsinSlug, nhlSlug, primaryColor, secondaryColor, tertiaryColor FROM nhl_teams WHERE abbrev IN ('NYI', 'NYR') OR name LIKE '%Islanders%' OR name LIKE '%Rangers%' ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, name, nickname, city, abbrev, dbSlug, vsinSlug, nhlSlug, primaryColor, secondaryColor, tertiaryColor FROM nhl_teams WHERE abbrev IN ('NYI', 'NYR') OR name LIKE '%Islanders%' OR name LIKE '%Rangers%' ORDER BY name;
stdout:
